title: RHLMA: A Role-Hierarchical LLM Multi-Agent Framework for Airborne Software Requirement Review
authors: Jinghua Sun, Rongtai Yang, Jingjing Gu, Lili Chen, Yige Zhao, Xin Yang
publish: 2026 International Conference on Multi-scale Artificial Intelligence (MAI)
abstract: The development of airborne software must strictly adhere to airworthiness standards such as DO-178C, where a rigorous review of requirements is crucial to ensure software quality and flight safety. However, existing automated methods encounter three critical limitations when processing the complex semantics of airborne software requirements: poor domain knowledge adaptation, inefficient multi-agent collaboration, and trustworthiness degradation caused by LLM overconfidence. To address these issues, this paper proposes RHLMA, a review framework based on Role-Hierarchical Large Language Model Multi-Agent collaboration. First, we construct a multi-task instruction dataset for the airborne domain and enhance the base model’s domain adaptation capability via supervised fine-tuning. Subsequently, a hierarchical collaborative architecture is designed, comprising task coordination, specialized review, and trusted aggregation. Through role-specific division of labor and hierarchical communication, the framework significantly reduces interaction overhead while ensuring comprehensive, multi-dimensional review depth. Furthermore, we integrate a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) module and a confidence calibration mechanism to dynamically reference authoritative knowledge, thereby improving the trustworthiness and traceability of the review outcomes. Experiments conducted on real-world airborne software requirement data demonstrate that RHLMA substantially outperforms baseline methods on core review metrics, achieving higher accuracy alongside efficiency and reliability. The proposed framework thus offers an efficient and trustworthy solution for automated requirement review in safety-critical domains.
title_zh: RHLMA：一种用于机载软件需求评审的角色层次化大语言模型多智能体框架
abstract_zh: 机载软件的开发必须严格遵守诸如DO-178C等适航标准，其中对需求的严格评审对于确保软件质量和飞行安全至关重要。然而，现有的自动化方法在处理机载软件需求的复杂语义时面临三个关键限制：领域知识适应性差、多智能体协作效率低，以及大语言模型过度自信导致的可信度下降。为解决这些问题，本文提出了RHLMA，一种基于角色层次化大语言模型多智能体协作的评审框架。首先，我们构建了面向机载领域的多任务指令数据集，并通过监督微调提升基础模型的领域适应能力。随后，设计了一种层次化协作架构，包括任务协调、专业评审和可信聚合。通过角色分工和层次化通信，该框架显著降低了交互开销，同时确保了全面、多维度的评审深度。此外，我们集成了检索增强生成模块和置信度校准机制，以动态引用权威知识，从而提高评审结果的可信度和可追溯性。在真实机载软件需求数据上进行的实验表明，RHLMA在核心评审指标上显著优于基线方法，实现了更高的准确性以及效率和可靠性。因此，所提出的框架为安全关键领域的自动化需求评审提供了一种高效且可信的解决方案。

title: Artificial Intelligence Visual Studio Code Reviewer
authors: Adnan Shaout, Akshat Sikligar
publish: 2026 2nd International Conference on Computational Intelligence Approaches and Applications (ICCIAA)
abstract: This paper introduces an automated code-analysis and unit-test generation system developed using the Waterfall software engineering methodology. The system is implemented as a full-stack application with an Angular frontend, Java/SpringBoot backend, and an integrated Visual Studio (VS) Code extension. Using the OpenAI API, the system analyzes source code, detects potential code smells, and generates unit test templates to assist developers in improving software quality. The use of a software process ensured a structured and traceable development workflow was in place. The AI Visual Studio code review extension introduced in this paper is able to automate unit test generation and detect code smells. This tool provides an integrated system between a frontend application, backend services, and OpenAI API integration. Experimental results show that the system can reliably detect common code issues and produce meaningful unit tests that aligns with standard software testing practices. The paper contributes to ongoing research and industry efforts aimed at improving software quality assurance and showcases how modern AI-assisted tooling can enhance developer productivity.
title_zh: 人工智能 Visual Studio Code 代码审查器
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种采用瀑布软件工程方法论开发的自动化代码分析与单元测试生成系统。该系统作为全栈应用实现，包含Angular前端、Java/SpringBoot后端以及集成的Visual Studio（VS）Code扩展。系统利用OpenAI API分析源代码，检测潜在代码坏味，并生成单元测试模板，以帮助开发者提升软件质量。软件流程的使用确保了开发工作流的系统性与可追溯性。本文提出的AI Visual Studio代码审查扩展能够自动生成单元测试并检测代码坏味。该工具在前端应用、后端服务与OpenAI API集成之间提供了完整的系统方案。实验结果表明，该系统能够可靠地检测常见代码问题，并生成符合标准软件测试实践的有意义的单元测试。本文为旨在提升软件质量保证的持续研究与行业工作做出了贡献，并展示了现代AI辅助工具如何增强开发者生产力。

title: SmarTracker: Leveraging LLMs to Automate User Behavior Tracking in Mobile Apps
authors: Shuohan Wu, Hao Zhou, Kaifa Zhao, Le Yu, Shudi Bao, Xiapu Luo
publish: IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering
abstract:
The explosive growth of the mobile application market makes it a significant challenge for developers to increase their user retention. To deliver personalized experiences that attract and engage users, developers are placing greater emphasis on understanding user intentions and building detailed user profiles. A common practice is to insert tracking code during app development to log in-app user behaviors, such as button clicks and page visits, which are used in downstream software analytics tasks. However, current approaches for generating such tracking code face two key limitations: they either require substantial manual coding effort, or often fail to capture the full meaning behind user actions.

To address this, in this paper, we take the first step toward applying large language models (LLMs) for the automated generation of tracking code. We present SmarTracker, a tool that first automatically instruments Android apps to track finegrained UI-level user interactions. To capture the semantics of these interactions, SmarTracker analyzes Android app source code to extract rich contextual information. It then leverages an LLM to interpret user interaction contexts and generate tracking code that accurately captures the semantics of user behavior. We extensively evaluate SmarTracker on real-world Android apps. The result shows that it can reliably reconstruct user interactions with high accuracy, while preserving essential semantic details that reflect the underlying business logic of user behaviors. Runtime measurements further confirm that the system introduces minimal overhead. Overall, SmarTracker offers a practical and effective solution to integrating user behavior tracking into the mobile development workflow.
title_zh: SmarTracker：利用大型语言模型自动化移动应用中的用户行为追踪
abstract_zh: 移动应用市场的爆炸式增长，使得开发者提升用户留存率面临重大挑战。为提供能吸引用户并增强参与度的个性化体验，开发者愈发重视理解用户意图并构建详细的用户画像。一种常见做法是在应用开发过程中插入跟踪代码，记录按钮点击、页面访问等用户行为，这些数据将用于下游的软件分析任务。然而，当前生成此类跟踪代码的方法存在两大局限：要么需要大量人工编码，要么无法完整捕捉用户行为背后的语义。为此，本文首度尝试将大语言模型（LLM）应用于跟踪代码的自动化生成。我们提出了SmarTracker工具，它首先自动对Android应用进行插桩，以追踪细粒度的UI级用户交互。为捕捉这些交互的语义，SmarTracker通过分析Android应用源码提取丰富的上下文信息，进而利用大语言模型解读用户交互上下文，生成能准确反映用户行为语义的跟踪代码。我们在真实Android应用上对SmarTracker进行了全面评估。结果表明，该工具能够高精度地可靠重建用户交互，同时保留反映用户行为底层业务逻辑的必要语义细节。运行时测量进一步证实系统引入的开销极低。总体而言，SmarTracker为将用户行为跟踪集成到移动开发流程中提供了一种实用且有效的解决方案。

title: HF-DGF: Hybrid Feedback Guided Directed Grey-box Fuzzing
authors: Guangfa Lyu, Zhenzhong Cao, Xiaofei Ren, Fengyu Wang
publish: IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering
abstract:
Directed Grey-box Fuzzing (DGF) is widely used for crash reproduction and patch testing because it can steer execution toward predefined target locations. However, existing DGF tools often rely on limited runtime feedback, which weakens both target convergence and target-state exploration.

This paper presents HF-DGF, a directed grey-box fuzzing framework with hybrid feedback-guided seed scheduling. HF-DGF integrates control-flow distance, value-flow influence score, and slice coverage. For precise distance guidance, we design a backward-stepping algorithm that computes basic-block-level distances on a virtual interprocedural control-flow graph (ICFG). For deeper target-state exploration, we introduce value-flow influence and its corresponding metric, the value-flow influence score. To control the runtime cost introduced by hybrid feedback, we further adopt a selective instrumentation strategy.

Evaluation on 41 real-world vulnerabilities (32 valid for comparative analysis) shows that HF-DGF consistently outperforms existing tools. On average, it reproduces crashes 5.05× faster than AFL, 50.56× faster than AFL++, 5.79× faster than AFLGo, 73.75× faster than WindRanger, 2.56× faster than DAFL, and 8.45× faster than Beacon. Notably, among cases where all fuzzers trigger the target crash, HF-DGF achieves the lowest code coverage, indicating stronger directionality. It also outperforms AFLGo, WindRanger, DAFL, and Beacon in static-analysis efficiency.
title_zh: HF-DGF：混合反馈引导的定向灰盒模糊测试
abstract_zh:
定向灰盒模糊测试（DGF）被广泛用于漏洞复现和补丁测试，因为它能够引导执行流趋向预定义的目标位置。然而，现有的DGF工具通常依赖有限的运行时反馈，这削弱了目标收敛性和目标状态探索能力。本文提出了HF-DGF，一种采用混合反馈引导种子调度的定向灰盒模糊测试框架。HF-DGF整合了控制流距离、值流影响分数和切片覆盖率。为了实现精确的距离引导，我们设计了一种反向步进算法，在虚拟的过程间控制流图（ICFG）上计算基本块级别的距离。为了更深入地探索目标状态，我们引入了值流影响及其对应的度量指标——值流影响分数。为了控制混合反馈带来的运行时开销，我们进一步采用了一种选择性插桩策略。  
对41个真实世界漏洞（其中32个可用于比较分析）的评估表明，HF-DGF始终优于现有工具。平均而言，它比AFL快5.05倍，比AFL++快50.56倍，比AFLGo快5.79倍，比WindRanger快73.75倍，比DAFL快2.56倍，比Beacon快8.45倍。值得注意的是，在所有模糊器都能触发目标漏洞的案例中，HF-DGF实现了最低的代码覆盖率，这表明其具有更强的方向性。此外，在静态分析效率方面，它也优于AFLGo、WindRanger、DAFL和Beacon。

title: Fault Diagnosis in Analog Circuits Using Quadratic Discriminant Analysis Classifier
authors: Shaktikanta Jena, Karmila Soren, Tapas Kumar Patra
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Artificial Intelligence &amp; Machine Learning in Communication and Power Systems (AIMLCPS)
abstract: Analog circuitry continues to play a crucial role in modern electronic systems; however, its long-standing reliability has been increasingly challenged by soft and parametric defects that degrade operational integrity. This study presents a machine learning-based diagnostic architecture designed to detect and classify faults in analog integrated circuits (AICs). The proposed method exploits frequency-domain features extracted from the real and imaginary components of the output voltage and supply current responses, which offer strong discriminative capability. These features are systematically generated using frequency-domain Monte Carlo simulations. Several classification techniques, including Support Vector Machine (SVM), k-Nearest Neighbors (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$k$</tex>-NN), Random Forest (RF), and Quadratic Discriminant Analysis (QDA), were evaluated using standard performance metrics such as precision, recall, and overall accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that QDA delivers superior performance, achieving an average classification accuracy of 99.8%, and outperforming conventional neuro-fuzzy and Artificial Neural Network (ANN) approaches. Experimental validation was conducted using three benchmark circuits: a Sallen-Key band-pass filter, a four-op-amp high-pass filter, and a leapfrog filter. All circuits were modeled in SPICE, with component variations of up to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\pm 50 \%$</tex> introduced to emulate realistic parametric deviations.
title_zh: 使用二次判别分析分类器的模拟电路故障诊断
abstract_zh: 模拟电路在现代电子系统中继续发挥着关键作用；然而，其长期以来的可靠性正日益受到软缺陷和参数缺陷的挑战，这些缺陷会损害其运行完整性。本研究提出了一种基于机器学习的诊断架构，旨在检测和分类模拟集成电路（AIC）中的故障。该方法利用了从输出电压和电源电流响应的实部和虚部中提取的频域特征，这些特征具有较强的判别能力。这些特征通过频域蒙特卡洛模拟系统性地生成。多种分类技术，包括支持向量机（SVM）、k近邻（<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$k$</tex>-NN）、随机森林（RF）和二次判别分析（QDA），均采用标准性能指标如精确率、召回率和总体准确率进行了评估。实验结果表明，QDA表现优异，平均分类准确率达到99.8%，优于传统的神经模糊和人工神经网络（ANN）方法。实验验证使用了三个基准电路：Sallen-Key带通滤波器、四运放高通滤波器和跳蛙滤波器。所有电路均在SPICE中建模，并引入了高达<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\pm 50 \%$</tex>的元件变化，以模拟实际的参数偏差。

title: An Efficient Preprocessing based Transfer Learning Approach for Multi-Plant Disease Recognition
authors: Vijaya Bhasker Reddy, S. Satheeskumaran
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Social Networking (ICPCSN)
abstract: Plant leaf diseases are a major factor affecting agricultural productivity, particularly in countries that depend heavily on agriculture. Leaf diseases occurring during the crop growth reduce the overall agricultural yield results in financial losses to farmers. Multi-plant leaf disease detection is necessary to address crop growth issues, support farmers, and improve agricultural productivity. Existing transfer learning approaches are not suitable for multi-plant leaf disease classification involving multiple disease classes. Hence, this work proposes a multi-class leaf disease detection and classification model suitable for multiple crops. Four different transfer learning models, namely Deep CNN, AlexNet, ResNet50, and VGG16, have been implemented and assessed using three different plant datasets: tomato, potato, and cotton. The collected datasets were preprocessed using median filters before classification. The preprocessing could make the data sets better for learning and classification of models. The obtained results of proposed preprocessing based VGG16 transfer learning model achieved the average classification accuracy of 95.5% which is highest among all the four models being tested, while evaluating on three selected plant datasets.
title_zh: 一种基于高效预处理的迁移学习方法用于多植物病害识别
abstract_zh: 植物叶病是影响农业生产力的主要因素，尤其是在严重依赖农业的国家。作物生长期间发生的叶病会降低整体农业产量，给农民造成经济损失。多作物叶病检测对于解决作物生长问题、支持农民以及提高农业生产力至关重要。现有的迁移学习方法不适用于涉及多种病害类别的多作物叶病分类。因此，本研究提出了一种适用于多种作物的多类别叶病检测与分类模型。四种不同的迁移学习模型（即深度卷积神经网络、AlexNet、ResNet50 和 VGG16）已被实现，并利用番茄、马铃薯和棉花这三种不同植物的数据集进行了评估。在分类之前，收集的数据集使用中值滤波器进行了预处理。预处理可以使数据集更适合模型的学习和分类。基于预处理的 VGG16 迁移学习模型在三个选定的植物数据集上评估时，获得的平均分类准确率为 95.5%，这是在所有四个被测试模型中准确率最高的。

title: Extreme Learning Machine Software Defect Prediction Hybrid Model
authors: Ala M. Abu-Samaha, Islam Akram Twaiqat
publish: 2026 2nd International Conference on Computational Intelligence Approaches and Applications (ICCIAA)
abstract: This paper proposes a hybrid model that utilises supervised machine learning classification to facilitate Software Defect Prediction (SDP) process which aims to discover which parts of a software system may contain defects to provide in advance valuable information on software defects. The model enhances the Software Defects Prediction process performance by using Random Forest (RF) as a feature selector and Extreme Learning Machine (ELM) as a classifier. The model was empirically tested through its application to NASA’s PROMISE software engineering repository datasets. By comparing the results of the proposed model with other relative approaches (Support Vector Machine (SVM), Random Forest (RF), Naïve Bayes (NB) algorithms as feature selectors and Decision Tree and Naïve Bayes (NB) as a classifier), the obtained results show an improved performance of the prediction process. RF-based feature selection consistently outperforms SVM and NB-based feature selection in particular for ELM and Decision Tree classifiers. On the other hand, ELM with moderate neuron size (200) offers the best trade-off between complexity and performance.
title_zh: 极限学习机软件缺陷预测混合模型
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种混合模型，利用监督式机器学习分类来促进软件缺陷预测（SDP）过程，该过程旨在发现软件系统中可能包含缺陷的部分，从而提前提供关于软件缺陷的宝贵信息。该模型通过采用随机森林（RF）作为特征选择器、极限学习机（ELM）作为分类器，提升了软件缺陷预测过程的性能。通过将模型应用于NASA的PROMISE软件工程存储库数据集进行实证测试，并将所提模型的结果与其他相关方法（使用支持向量机（SVM）、随机森林（RF）、朴素贝叶斯（NB）算法作为特征选择器，以及决策树和朴素贝叶斯（NB）作为分类器）进行比较，所得结果表明预测过程的性能有所提升。基于RF的特征选择始终优于基于SVM和NB的特征选择，特别是在ELM和决策树分类器中。另一方面，具有中等神经元数量（200）的ELM在复杂性和性能之间提供了最佳权衡。
